Properties.commandText:
SELECT CASE
    WHEN EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM [Users] AS [u]) THEN CAST(1 AS bit)
    ELSE CAST(0 AS bit)
END

FROM [Products] AS [p]
WHERE [p].[Id] = @ids1 AND [p].[IsActive] = CAST(1 AS bit)

FROM [Products] AS [p]
WHERE [p].[Id] IN (@ids1, @ids2, @ids3, @ids4, @ids5) AND [p].[IsActive] = CAST(1 AS bit)

Properties.commandText:
SET IMPLICIT_TRANSACTIONS OFF;
SET NOCOUNT ON;
MERGE [OrderItems] USING (
VALUES (@p5, @p6, @p7, @p8, @p9, 0),
(@p10, @p11, @p12, @p13, @p14, 1),
(@p15, @p16, @p17, @p18, @p19, 2),
(@p20, @p21, @p22, @p23, @p24, 3),
(@p25, @p26, @p27, @p28, @p29, 4)) AS i ([OrderId], [ProductId], [ProductName], [Quantity], [UnitPrice], _Position) ON 1=0
WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN
INSERT ([OrderId], [ProductId], [ProductName], [Quantity], [UnitPrice])
VALUES (i.[OrderId], i.[ProductId], i.[ProductName], i.[Quantity], i.[UnitPrice])
OUTPUT INSERTED.[Id], i._Position;
